ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'Hatsune Miku"Dark Angel"'; the PD/S22 set is a licensed Vocaloid/SEGA Product DIVA F adaptation published by Bushiroad. Depicted figure matches the canonical Dark Angel module appearance: green twintails, gothic lolita dress, black-and-white color scheme. No ambiguity.

trivia_bullets.text: PD/S22 is the Weiss Schwarz booster set adapting Hatsune Miku: Project DIVA F (2013), published by Bushiroad under license from SEGA and Crypton Future Media. The English edition contains 100 card types (8 RR / 20 R / 28 U / 28 C / 16 CX) plus 44 parallel variants, with 4 exclusive SP Gold Foil signed cards from voice actress Saki Fujita (the voice of Hatsune Miku) randomly inserted per display. [Weiss Schwarz official product page]

The Dark Angel costume (module) first appeared in Hatsune Miku: Project DIVA F, unlocked by clearing the song 'Secret Police' (Himitsu Keisatsu) by producer Buriru-P on any difficulty. The module's gothic lolita design — jet black dress, white lace, drilled twintails, feather clips — is a direct homage to that song's aesthetic. [Project DIVA Wiki: Dark Angel]

Hatsune Miku is a Vocaloid character developed by Crypton Future Media and released in August 2007 as a singing synthesizer software; she is the most commercially successful Vocaloid internationally, with no single lore narrative — her identity is defined through community-produced songs and SEGA's Project DIVA game appearances. The PD/S22 Weiss Schwarz set is one of multiple official TCG adaptations of the franchise. [Vocaloid Wiki: Hatsune Miku, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Vocaloid Wiki: Hatsune Miku, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: As a Common (C rarity) in Weiss Schwarz, this card occupies the base of the rarity pyramid in PD/S22 — the set's high-value slots are the SP Gold Foil signed parallels. Commons in Weiss Schwarz are the deck-engine workhorses; without oracle text captured, specific mechanical role in the PD/S22 build cannot be confirmed. [PokemonTCG.io; Weiss Schwarz product page]
